back_translation: And when He opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour
And I saw the seven angels who stand before God, and they received seven trumpets

And another angel came and stood at the altar, holding a golden incense-vessel, and received much incense, in order to offer it together with the prayers of all the saints, on the golden altar that is before the throne
And the smoke of the incense, together with the prayers of the saints, ascended before the face of God from the hand of the angel
And the angel received that incense-vessel, and filled it with fire from the altar, and threw it down on the earth, and there were thunders, voices, lightning-flashes, and an earthquake
And the seven angels who held the seven trumpets prepared themselves to blow the trumpets

And the first angel blew the trumpet, and there was hail and fire mingled with blood, thrown down on the earth, and one-third of the earth was burned up, and one-third of the trees was burned up, and all the green grass was burned up
And the second angel blew the trumpet, and there was something like a great mountain burning with fire thrown down into the sea, and one-third of the sea became blood
And one-third of the created-things in the sea that have life died, and one-third of the ships were also destroyed
And the third angel blew the trumpet, and there was a great star fallen down from heaven, burning like a torch, and it fell on one-third of the rivers and on the springs of waters
And that star had the name ‘Bitterness.’ And one-third of the waters became bitter, and many people died from those waters, because those waters became bitter

And the fourth angel blew the trumpet, and one-third of the sun, the moon, and the stars were struck, so that one-third of their light became dark, and one-third of the day did not show light, and the night likewise

And I saw, and heard one eagle flying in the middle of the sky, speaking with a loud voice, ‘Woe, woe, woe to those who dwell on the earth, because of the remaining three trumpet-sounds that the three angels are about to blow’
